creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: The cause could be KDE print manager after all.  I didn't think it would be the cause because I also use KDE and have it installed.  I've never actually used it though and now that I check the code it does use the CUPS D-Bus notifier.  The code is in print/kde4-print-manager/work/print-manager-4.14.3/libkcups/KCupsConnection.cpp.  Did you setup the printer via KDE print manager?  Maybe you can go without DBUS option if you set it up via the CUPS manager at http://localhost:631 instead.
